title: 7/20/19 Back to work on Google Earthing History Page

transcript.text: Hey, how's it going? Living in Boulder, V-Log, July 20th, 2019, Saturday, 6.33 p.m.
It's been like a week or whatever since I did a video because my fiancé came and visited me for like nine days.
Actually having a brusky rot, nah, because my mom is on vacation again and making me go over there and let the putty tat out.
And again at the end of every day and I went, I looked in the refrigerator and I saw four bruskies.
I'm like, that bitch is going to make me take care of her putty tat for like a freaking week or whatever.
I'm going to take beers.
So, yeah, and I left my fiancé off last night.
So last night was my first night.
I just maxed and relaxed.
And then today, yeah, I didn't get to sleep until like five in the morning, but I wasn't working on my website.
And then today, yeah, working.
Yeah, my fiancé visiting me made it so that I could like kind of break, mentally break free from Atlantis,
Even though there's a lot of stuff in Atlantis that I know I need to do yet.
But I got it up here.
When I go in, I'll know exactly what I have to do, you know.
Finish the canals on the island and the lots.
Figure out what I'm going to do about the 60,000 lots.
And then the city, there's a few things.
I have to put the support pillars on the beach road.
And then I'm going to put towers, I think maybe like Lincoln Cathedral towers and all the lakes around it.
And I'm thinking we knew, but yeah, so I think I'm just going to break free for a little bit.
I'm going to go out and look for surface level, fix links.
I'm going to do a Google Earth downloads page today because I noticed that I didn't have all the tribes.
You know, I have tribes for download in two different places in my timeline, but then there's like a Google Earth download.
So it's like a separate page, so it's two different ways to organize it.
So I did, and then I realized I had to finish with the tribes with the colors.
So I did the colors after I did a whole bunch transferring them.
So I have to do colors twice.
And so, yeah, now I'm dragging it on there and then do the colors for the tribes on the Google Earth downloads.

And then after that, yeah, I just want to finish all the Google Earth downloads, making sure all the Google Earth's good and everything's LinkedIn and stuff, all the stuff that I've been working on, you know, because I think I even lost, I can't find the Lake of Augustus in Rome.
And, you know, I want to have that for download, you know, have all the little things for download, just set all that up.
I want to do surface, it's called what I call surface level stuff, the stuff you see when you first go in on the main pages.
And, yeah, all those pages, so that's what I'll do.
I'll just, I wasn't listening to any, like, audiobook or anything today.

Yeah, because my fiancée, she was here, we did a lot of stuff, you know, went to the museum to lead our Da Vinci exhibit, and then the IMAX moon landing, and then boated, kayaked on Boulder Reservoir,

And then Gross Reservoir climbed Mount Audubon, and then hiked up to the lake near there, and then hiked around the Flatirons, drove up the top of Pikes Peak, and, yeah, that's what I remember now, just stayed busy.
But, and we tried to go on a bike ride once, but my Copenhagen wheel got, like, demagnetized, it got magnetized, it wouldn't work.
It only worked for two minutes, and then it stopped working, like, lose connection.
So, I emailed them, and they emailed me back, and they said that all I have to do is buy a demagnetizer for $16 on Amazon, so I'll go and order that, and then see if that works.
It gets magnetized if you take the wheel off.
I put the wheel, I took the wheel off, and then I put a regular wheel on, because I have a nice bike, a nice road bike that I can set up to fit me and her.

She's 5'5", and so, but I guess taking it, so it'd be a normal bike, so we rode around normally for a little bit, and then I put it on the Copenhagen wheel, and because I took off that other wheel, it demagnetized it, and so then you have to magnetize with a machine.
Crazy.
So, anyway, we didn't get to ride this time, but we'll do it next time.
She wants to come back this year, so.
That's the main thing that we were both most excited about was the riding, you know, going up the mountains.
We were going to see if we could climb a mountain like Autobahn or something just on the electric bike, if it had enough charge, because she's only, like, 110 pounds, maybe at last, you know.
So, yeah, so tomorrow when I do my video, maybe sometime at noon or whatever, I, yeah, I don't even know where I'm going to be.
Hopefully I can get done with this, you know, Google Earth downloads.
When I look at surface-level pages and I see that they're totally fucked, I'm like, oh, my God.
But it gets super, super fun to work on, because you can, you know how much actual change, you know, you're making on the website, so.
But, yeah, I'll have to eventually get back to the Atlantis, but I wanted to get back to these tribes, you know, and the color coding.
I didn't even know how I wanted it to be, so at least I'm getting this over with.
Okay, that's enough talking.
I think I'm just going to listen to some more, watching some Sam Seder, and I don't know if I'll listen to something later on, but.
Yeah, I'm going to work all night long on this, the tribes.
Okay, later.
